description: Transient Runtime Prompts - first evolving PRD slice

finalSuccessCriteria.description: Ralph no longer requires DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, or DOCTOR.md to be initialized into each target repository; run and fix flows load prompt templates from the installed Ralph dependency, write only the tool-specific runtime prompt needed for the active phase, and clean up or restore that runtime file when the command finishes.
acceptanceCriteria: ralph init no longer copies DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, or DOCTOR.md into the target project
ralph run loads DEVELOPER.md and PLANNER.md from the Ralph package templates instead of requiring those files in the target project
ralph fix loads DOCTOR.md from the Ralph package templates instead of requiring that file in the target project
The active validation issue(s) are still injected into the doctor prompt before the single fix pass runs
Generated runtime prompt files such as prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, and AGENTS.md are removed after run/fix when Ralph created them
If a runtime prompt file already existed before run/fix, Ralph restores its previous contents instead of deleting or overwriting it permanently
Errors during an AI phase still trigger cleanup or restoration before the command exits
Documentation and CLI help no longer tell users to keep phase prompt files in their project root
Manual CLI verification demonstrates init omits phase prompt files and run/fix create then clean up or restore runtime prompt files

planning.currentObjective: Stop installing phase prompt files and make run/fix use dependency templates with runtime prompt cleanup

userStories.title: Use transient runtime prompts from package templates
userStories.description: As a Ralph user, I want init to keep my repository free of Ralph phase prompt files while run and fix temporarily materialize only the prompt file required by the selected AI tool, so Ralph can operate from its dependency templates without leaving generated prompt files behind.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ralph init so it no longer copies DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, or DOCTOR.md into the target project, while still creating/copying prd.json.example and progress.txt as appropriate
Update ralph run to read DEVELOPER.md and PLANNER.md from `join(getPackageDir(), "templates")` and remove the target-project required-file checks for those prompt files
Update ralph fix to read DOCTOR.md from `join(getPackageDir(), "templates")` and remove the target-project required-file check for DOCTOR.md
Preserve doctor behavior by injecting the exact current prd.json validation errors under the existing clear heading before invoking the AI tool

Add a shared helper or local equivalent so writing a tool runtime prompt records whether prompt.md, CLAUDE.md, or AGENTS.md already existed and deletes generated files or restores previous content in a finally/cleanup path
Ensure cleanup/restoration runs after successful phases, after failed AI tool execution, and after failed post-run validation where applicable
Update README/CLI documentation so setup no longer instructs users to keep DEVELOPER.md, PLANNER.md, or DOCTOR.md in the project root
Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck` exits 0 in cli/)

Manual CLI verification in a temporary directory confirms `ralph init` omits phase prompt files and `ralph run`/`ralph fix` do not leave generated runtime prompt files behind or permanently overwrite an existing runtime prompt file
